notes: Fomapan R (R-100 reversal process) datasheet: FIRST development, Fomadon LQR (1+10), 9-10 min at 20C (+/-0.5). Reversal process; timeSec is midpoint. Full R-100 process also includes wash, bleach (FB-2), cleaning bath, second exposure/reversal bath, second development, fix (FU-5), wash.
